Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Staying Proceedings Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-23-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Allen M. Sowle. LL.M., for Defendant/Moving Party, RAGING STALLION STUDIOS
Andrea L. Goodman of Goodman & Bhutani, LLP for Plaintiff, Phillip Baxley aka Sky Donovan

Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling, DEFENDANT RAGING STALLION STUDIOS Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Staying Proceedings Pending Arbitration, Granted. Order by stipulation removing driver's license and social security card #'s of Plaintiff Phillip Baxley from the Declaration of Christopher Ward, filed 2/20/04 was also signed in open court. (AJR/301/AC) JOYCE D. LONG, CSR: 8620

Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Staying Proceedings Pending Arbitration

Alen M. Sowle, Esq. (415) 626-6260, for Defendant and Moving Party Raging Stallion Studios
Andrea L. Goodman, Esq., Goodman & Bhutani LLP (415) 206-0882, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Baxley
RULING:
Attorney Goodman presents to the Court a motion for continuance: GRANTED.
DEFENDANT RAGING STALLION STUDIOS' Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Staying Proceedings Pending Arbitration is CONTINUED to 03/23/04; opposition shall be filed immediately; reply pleadings shall be filed no later than 12 Noon on 03/22/04. (301/AJR/) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620
